title: Unhandled exception when changing theme colors
author: teddyross
body_snippet:
I changed a few colors in my theme, hit OK, and an unhandled exception occurred.

```
Exception Message
"Empty path name is not legal."

Stack trace
   at System.IO.FileStream.Init(String path, FileMode mode, FileAccess access, Int32 rights, Boolean useRights, FileShare share, Int32 bufferSize, FileOptions options, SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES secAttrs, String msgPath, Boolean bFromProxy, Boolean useLongPath, Boolean checkHost)
   at System.IO.FileStream..ctor(String path, FileMode mode, FileAcce...

iterations.description: NullReferenceException in ListPalette_CellClick when e.Model is null (header/empty row click) — missing null guard before PseudoKeyColor cast

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (claude): NullReferenceException in ListPalette_CellClick when e.Model is null (header/empty row click) — missing null guard before PseudoKeyColor cast
Approach: Add null check at start of ListPalette_CellClick: if (e.Model == null) return;
